mapper.select:
SELECT a.member_chnl_id AS memberChannelId, a.member_chnl_nm AS memberChannelName, a.member_chnl_sn AS channelPriority, a.pin_type AS pinType, a.pin_type_id AS pinTypeId, ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_map_member_chnl_track aa JOIN tb_track bb ON aa.track_id = bb.track_id AND bb.disp_status_yn= 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN bb.disp_start_dtime AND bb.disp_end_dtime WHERE aa.member_chnl_id = a.member_chnl_id
) AS trackCount, IFNULL(a.chnl_play_tm, 0) AS channelPlayTime, a.update_dtime AS updateDateTime, a.create_dtime AS createDateTime, b.album_id AS albumId, b.title AS albumTitle, c.album_img_size AS size, c.album_img_url AS url, c.update_dtime AS albumImgUpdateDateTime FROM tb_member_chnl AS a LEFT JOIN ted_album b ON b.album_id = ( SELECT aa.album_id FROM tb_track aa JOIN tb_map_member_chnl_track bb ON aa.track_id = bb.track_id JOIN tb_member_chnl cc ON bb.member_chnl_id = cc.member_chnl_id WHERE cc.member_chnl_id = a.member_chnl_id AND aa.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN aa.disp_start_dtime AND aa.disp_end_dtime ORDER BY bb.update_dtime DESC, bb.track_sn ASC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN tb_album_img c ON b.album_id = c.album_id WHERE a.character_no = #{characterNo} AND a.member_no = #{memberNo} AND a.member_chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY a.update_dtime DESC, a.member_chnl_sn ASC
mapper.update:
UPDATE TB_MEMBER_CHNL A
ALBUM_ID = #{albumId, javaType=LONG},
MEMBER_CHNL_SN = #{viewPriority},
TRACK_CNT = IFNULL((SELECT COUNT(B.TRACK_ID) FROM TB_MAP_MEMBER_CHNL_TRACK B WHERE A.MEMBER_CHNL_ID = B.MEMBER_CHNL_ID), 0),
CHNL_PLAY_TM = IFNULL((SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN LENGTH(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM) > 5 THEN CAST(SUBSTR(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM, 1, 3) AS UNSIGNED) ELSE CAST(SUBSTR(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM, 1, 2) AS UNSIGNED) END) + TRUNCATE(SUM(CAST(SUBSTR(C.TRACK_PLAY_TM, 4, 2) AS UNSIGNED)) / 60, 0) FROM TB_MAP_MEMBER_CHNL_TRACK D JOIN TB_TRACK C ON D.TRACK_ID = C.TRACK_ID WHERE A.MEMBER_CHNL_ID = D.MEMBER_CHNL_ID), 0),
UPDATE_DTIME = #{updateDateTime}
AND MEMBER_CHNL_ID = #{channelId, javaType=LONG} AND CHARACTER_NO = #{characterNo, javaType=LONG} AND MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo, javaType=LONG}
mapper.select: SELECT b.album_id FROM tb_map_member_chnl_track a JOIN tb_track b ON a.track_id = b.track_id AND b.disp_status_yn = 'Y' AND now() BETWEEN b.disp_start_dtime AND b.disp_end_dtime WHERE a.member_chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY a.update_dtime DESC, a.track_sn ASC LIMIT 1;
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_member_chnl a LEFT OUTER JOIN ( SELECT mt.member_chnl_id, tt.album_id FROM tb_map_member_chnl_track mt JOIN tb_track tt ON tt.track_id = mt.track_id AND tt.disp_status_yn ='Y' AND now() BETWEEN tt.disp_start_dtime AND tt.disp_end_dtime WHERE mt.member_chnl_id = #{channelId} ORDER BY mt.update_dtime DESC, mt.track_sn ASC limit 1) b ON a.member_chnl_id = b.member_chnl_id SET a.album_id = ifnull(b.album_id,0), a.update_dtime = now() WHERE a.member_chnl_id = #{channelId}
mapper.select: SELECT member_chnl_id FROM tb_member_chnl WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo} AND pin_type IS NULL ORDER BY member_chnl_sn ASC LIMIT 10
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_member_chnl WHERE character_no = #{characterNo} AND member_no = #{memberNo}
